leadText: If you were looking for the Special Ability in Pokémon Battle Trozei, see List of Special Abilities in Pokémon Battle Trozei. Healer (Japanese: いやしのこころ Healing Heart) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] At the end of each turn, Healer has a 30% chance of curing an adjacent ally's status condition . If the Pokémon has multiple adjacent allies with status conditions, it has an independent 30% chance of curing each one, and can cure more than one in the same turn. If it cures a status condition, it does so before burn or poison damage is dealt on that turn. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Healer has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] At the end of each turn, Healer has a 30% chance of curing an adjacent ally's status condition . If the Pokémon has multiple adjacent allies with status conditions, it has an independent 30% chance of curing each one, and can cure more than one in the same turn. If it cures a status condition, it does so before burn or poison damage is dealt on that turn.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Conq. The Pokémon may heal an adjacent ally's status ailments. MD GtI Sometimes heals bad status conditions of allies standing next to the Pokémon. * Sometimes it heals the bad status conditions of allies next to the Pokémon! * S MD Sometimes it heals the bad status conditions of teammates next to the Pokémon!
